The Gamebreaker System

NOT A PROGRAM.
A SYSTEM.

A periodised training system built for rugby. Speed, strength, power, and conditioning — programmed to work together so you actually get faster and harder to stop.

⚡
SPEED & POWER
Sprint technique, acceleration, and max velocity — built specifically for rugby. Your force-velocity profile determines your program, so every session moves the needle where it matters.
🏋️
STRENGTH
Periodised programming that transfers gym gains to the field. No cookie-cutter templates — your program adapts to your position, your body, and your goals.
🔋
CONDITIONING
Smart load management so you peak — not burn out. Sprint days, power days, and recovery days sequenced around your training week and game schedule.

How It Works

FROM APPLICATION
TO ATHLETE

BOOK A CALL
15-minute free call. We talk about your goals, position, training history, and whether coaching is right for you. No pressure.
GET PROFILED
Sprint analysis, force/velocity profiling, and readiness assessment. We find out exactly where you are — and where the gaps are.
RECEIVE YOUR BLOCK
Your personalised 6-week block lands in the PPA Training app. Every session, every set, every progression — mapped out.
TRAIN & TRACK
Log sessions, track readiness, hit your KPIs. Weekly check-ins keep you accountable. Sprint video reviews sharpen your technique.
Choose Your Path

The Coach

ADAM PLUMMER

I CHASED THE DREAM. NOW I BUILD GAMEBREAKERS.

I'm not going to pretend the journey was clean. I chased a rugby league career, got knocked back, tore ligaments, got told I wasn't fast enough, wasn't big enough. I kept going anyway.

Along the way I became obsessed with one question: how do you make a rugby athlete faster? Not gym-strong. Not "looks good on paper." Actually faster on the field — with the ball, under fatigue, when it counts.

The Gamebreaker System is the answer. Built on the work of Bondarchuk, Charlie Francis, Zatsiorsky — adapted for collision sport athletes. Every program I write follows the same framework I wish I'd had when I was chasing my own dream.

S&C Coach Sprint Specialist BXSC Junior Waratahs Academy Newcastle Wildfires Rugby League Rugby Union Newcastle, AUS

Questions

FAQ

Coaching is fully personalised — I build your program based on your profile, review your sprint videos, adjust each block based on your progress, and check in weekly. The 6-week program is a pre-built Gamebreaker block you follow on your own. Same system, but no individual attention.

If you play rugby — league or union — at any competitive level and you want to get faster, stronger, and more explosive, yes. The system scales to your level. I've coached everything from local comp to semi-pro.

$79.95/week with the option to pay weekly. Programs run in 6-week blocks, and most athletes stay for multiple blocks because the system builds on itself.

Yes. You'll need a gym with barbells, dumbbells, and basic equipment. You'll also need field or track access for sprint sessions. I can work around equipment limitations, but a decent gym is ideal.

It's our custom-built training platform. You log sessions, track readiness, see your program, and monitor progress — all in one place. It's included with coaching and will be available for program users too.

Absolutely. In-season programming is different to off-season — lower volume, maintenance-focused, with CNS management around game days. The Gamebreaker System adapts to your phase.
